typeDescription.name: org.texttechnologylab.annotation.NeerMatchPrediction
typeDescription.description: A type representing a prediction of the NEER match model.

featureDescription.name: document1EntityId
featureDescription.description: The ID of the entity in the first document.

featureDescription.name: document1EntityText
featureDescription.description: The text of the entity in the first document.

featureDescription.name: document2EntityText
featureDescription.description: The text of the entity in the second document.

featureDescription.name: document2EntityId
featureDescription.description: The ID of the entity in the second document.

featureDescription.name: score
featureDescription.description: The confidence score of the prediction.
